sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92083" key="r(a/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥάζω</orth>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥύζω</foreign> (q.v.), <sense id="n92083.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">snarl</tr_>, as a dog, metaph. of men, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
